description: Style Note Worry no longer about managing money, cards, mobile phone and essentials in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish handbag from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this bag anywhere and add style to any casual outfit and formal outfit. Product Details Beige colour handbag with a leather-look finish and a woven-look finish on the handles and front pouch flap Two long handles A U shaped zipper that opens up a flap to give a wide mouth One main compartment with a zipped separator and an internal zipper pouch One small compartment in front with a flap with a sealed magnetic closure Two zippered pockets in the front on the sides Material and Care PU / Leatherette Wipe surface with a damp cloth when necessary Size Height: 45 cm Width: 41 cm Depth: 7 cm
